title: Warn about using Commands in Dockerfile that are not supported by OCI.

comments.body:
Code LGTM but the checkers want `"oci"` to be a const:
```
cmd/buildah/from.go:217:7:warning: 2 other occurrence(s) of "oci" found in: common.go:155:9 push.go:129:8 (goconst)
cmd/buildah/common.go:155:9:warning: 2 other occurrence(s) of "oci" found in: from.go:217:7 push.go:129:8 (goconst)
cmd/buildah/push.go:129:8:warning: 2 other occurrence(s) of "oci" found in: from.go:217:7 common.go:155:9 (goconst)
```
